name: Terminateur Anti-Spore
description: Fantassin renforcé conçu spécifiquement pour purger le Fléau Spore. Son armure scellée résiste aux infections fongiques.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark cyberpunk, L'Omni-Réseau faction. Reinforced anti-biological warfare infantry, sealed dark armor with decontamination seals, heavy flamethrower, dead eyes with cold blue neural glow, thick black cables on spine. Advancing through fungal spore-covered wasteland, purging with fire, cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
